use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and pages
Action buttons with multiple visual variants
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for consistent variant management. Features accessible focus rings, disabled states, and standard hover interactions.
